item.title: This is how your roof stays up!
item.description: Learn how key structural components work together to support a roof and keep a home stable. The video explains the construction techniques and framing principles that provide strength and long-term durability. What part of home construction would you like to learn about next?

media:content.media:title: This is how your roof stays up!
media:content.media:description: Learn how key structural components work together to support a roof and keep a home stable. The video explains the construction techniques and framing principles that provide strength and long-term durability. What part of home construction would you like to learn about next?

item.title: Modern Home Building
item.description: A look at modern home building, with a focus on construction progress, tools, and the hands-on work that brings a project together. What part of the build process do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: Modern Home Building
media:content.media:description: A look at modern home building, with a focus on construction progress, tools, and the hands-on work that brings a project together. What part of the build process do you find most interesting?

item.title: Building a Dream Home Episode 46
item.description: Episode 46 follows the building process on a dream home, with a focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, and hands-on work at the job site. What stage is the project at now?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home Episode 46
media:content.media:description: Episode 46 follows the building process on a dream home, with a focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, and hands-on work at the job site. What stage is the project at now?

item.title: Building Stairs: Easy Way to Mark and Cut Stringers
item.description: A practical look at marking and cutting stair stringers for a building project. Focused on the process, tools, and step-by-step craftsmanship. How do you approach stair layout?

media:content.media:title: Building Stairs: Easy Way to Mark and Cut Stringers
media:content.media:description: A practical look at marking and cutting stair stringers for a building project. Focused on the process, tools, and step-by-step craftsmanship. How do you approach stair layout?

item.title: Building the Walls for the Second Floor
item.description: A look at the wall-building process for the second floor, focused on construction progress and hands-on work on the job site. What comes next on the build?

media:content.media:title: Building the Walls for the Second Floor
media:content.media:description: A look at the wall-building process for the second floor, focused on construction progress and hands-on work on the job site. What comes next on the build?

item.title: nside the Dream Home Build: Episode 45
item.description: Follow the latest chapter in a dream home construction project as new milestones bring the build closer to completion. The video highlights ongoing craftsmanship, construction progress, and the work involved in creating a custom home. What part of the build are you most excited to see next?

media:content.media:title: nside the Dream Home Build: Episode 45
media:content.media:description: Follow the latest chapter in a dream home construction project as new milestones bring the build closer to completion. The video highlights ongoing craftsmanship, construction progress, and the work involved in creating a custom home. What part of the build are you most excited to see next?

item.title: Building a Dream Home Episode 45
item.description: Follow the latest progress in Episode 45 of a dream home build. The video showcases ongoing construction, key milestones, and the craftsmanship involved in bringing the project closer to completion. Which stage of the build has been your favorite so far?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home Episode 45
media:content.media:description: Follow the latest progress in Episode 45 of a dream home build. The video showcases ongoing construction, key milestones, and the craftsmanship involved in bringing the project closer to completion. Which stage of the build has been your favorite so far?

item.title: The Secret to a Perfect Ceiling
item.description: Learn practical techniques for installing a clean, level ceiling during a home construction project. The video covers preparation, installation tips, and methods for achieving a professional-looking finish. What home building skill would you like to learn next?

media:content.media:title: The Secret to a Perfect Ceiling
media:content.media:description: Learn practical techniques for installing a clean, level ceiling during a home construction project. The video covers preparation, installation tips, and methods for achieving a professional-looking finish. What home building skill would you like to learn next?

item.title: Our Machine Had a Little Problem
item.description: A construction machine runs into a problem on the job site, showing the realities of building work and keeping projects moving. A practical look at tools, equipment, and hands-on problem solving.

media:content.media:title: Our Machine Had a Little Problem
media:content.media:description: A construction machine runs into a problem on the job site, showing the realities of building work and keeping projects moving. A practical look at tools, equipment, and hands-on problem solving.

item.title: How To Install Doors In A Cabin
item.description: A practical look at installing doors in a cabin, with a focus on the building process, fit, and finish. This kind of hands-on work shows the tools and steps involved in keeping a project moving.

media:content.media:title: How To Install Doors In A Cabin
media:content.media:description: A practical look at installing doors in a cabin, with a focus on the building process, fit, and finish. This kind of hands-on work shows the tools and steps involved in keeping a project moving.

item.title: Reviewing and Unboxing a Dream Hammer
item.description: A detailed look at a premium hammer through an unboxing and hands-on review. The video explores its design, features, and performance to see what sets it apart. What is your favorite hand tool for construction projects?

media:content.media:title: Reviewing and Unboxing a Dream Hammer
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at a premium hammer through an unboxing and hands-on review. The video explores its design, features, and performance to see what sets it apart. What is your favorite hand tool for construction projects?

item.title: How To Frame a Porch Roof Like a Pro
item.description: A step-by-step tutorial demonstrating the process of framing a porch roof. The video covers layout, structural techniques, and practical tips for creating a strong and durable roof. What building skill would you like to learn next?

media:content.media:title: How To Frame a Porch Roof Like a Pro
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step tutorial demonstrating the process of framing a porch roof. The video covers layout, structural techniques, and practical tips for creating a strong and durable roof. What building skill would you like to learn next?
